info.name: Cameroon Property Management API
info.description: Complete API collection for the Cameroon Property Management platform. Uses djoser for authentication. Set environment variables: base_url (e.g., http://localhost:8000/api) and access_token (obtained after login).

body.raw:
{
    "name": "Résidence Les Acacias",
    "property_type": "apartment",
    "description": "Beautiful apartment building",
    "address_line1": "123 Rue de la Paix",
    "city": "Douala",
    "state": "Littoral",
    "country": "CM",
    "has_generator": true,
    "has_water_tank": true,
    "amenities": ["parking", "security"],
    "images": ["https://example.com/image1.jpg"],
    "managers": ["manager-uuid1", "manager-uuid2"]
}

{
    "company_name": "Plomberie Express",
    "contact_name": "Jean Claude",
    "phone": "+237612345678",
    "email": "jean@plomberie.cm",
    "address": "123 Rue des Artisans, Douala",
    "specialties": ["plumbing", "water heaters"],
    "notes": "Reliable and fast"
}
